arts.ttl: Former Portsmouth favourite's score prediction ahead of Derby game as he makes 'we've turned the corner' claim
arts.sum: David James believes Pompey have ‘turned the corner’ following a difficult start to life back in the Championship.

arts.ttl: What next for Wayne Rooney? Former Derby County boss suffers more misery at Plymouth
arts.sum: Goals from Jay Fulton and Liam Cullen gave Swansea a solid lead by the hour mark, and despite Mustapha Bundu's late consolation for Argyle, the side suffered their third consecutive loss. Former Derby County boss Wayne Rooney continues to struggle at Plymouth and has expressed his disappointment after Argyle dropped to 23rd place in the Championship following a 2-1 defeat against Swansea.

arts.ttl: 'It's as simple as that' - no Portsmouth rethink on cards ahead of January transfer window
arts.sum: Pompey’s current form will not force a January transfer window rethink.

arts.ttl: ‘Better than’ - Derby County boss Paul Warne makes honest Portsmouth admission ahead of Championship clash
arts.sum: Derby County have drawn all of their last four matches against Portsmouth in the league

arts.ttl: Portsmouth predicted XI and bench v Derby County as three changes made for huge Pride Park game
arts.sum: Pompey find themselves back in action tonight at Derby - just three days after their goalless draw against Norwich.

arts.ttl: Forsyth starts: Derby County team news and predicted XI to face Portsmouth
arts.sum: The latest Derby County team news as Paul Warne's side gear up to face Portsmouth in the Championship. The post Forsyth starts: Derby County team news and predicted XI to face Portsmouth appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Paul Warne clarifies Derby County loanee situation as challenge set
arts.sum: Paul Warne says Tawanda Chirewa must fight to get back into his Derby County squad but says no conversations are taking place about ending his loan from Wolves. Join our Derby County WhatsApp group to get the latest Rams headlines sent straight to your phone.

arts.ttl: 'Superb': John Mousinho on Portsmouth's remarkable comeback kid after ex-Carlisle's man first start in eight months
arts.sum: John Mousinho has hailed Pompey’s comeback kid after battling back from the wilderness to break into the first-team.
